differential_diagnoses: Connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease
next_steps: Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations (for PVOD/PCH)
Urgent lung transplant evaluation and listing
Discontinue or cautiously reduce epoprostenol due to risk of pulmonary edema
Surgical lung biopsy (if clinically stable enough to tolerate)
Bronchoalveolar lavage with cell count and fluid analysis
Immediate weaning or discontinuation of epoprostenol due to clinical deterioration and high risk of pulmonary edema
Careful optimization of right ventricular function with controlled diuresis and potential use of inotropic support
High-resolution CT review for specific patterns of PVOD/PCH (septal thickening, lymphadenopathy, and mosaic attenuation)
Avoidance of surgical lung biopsy due to prohibitive mortality risk in severe pulmonary hypertension
Multidisciplinary evaluation including specialized pulmonary hypertension center consultation
